<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="it">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Tesina Christian v2</title>
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&family=Share+Tech+Mono&family=Exo+2:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap');

*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
  --blue:#00aaff;
  --blue-dark:#0066cc;
  --blue-deep:#001a33;
  --blue-mid:#002244;
  --blue-bright:#33ccff;
  --blue-glow:rgba(0,170,255,0.35);
  --white:#e8f4ff;
  --dim:#7ab8d4;
  --gold:#c9a227;
}

html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{
  background:var(--blue-deep);
  color:var(--white);
  font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}

/* ══ SCROLLBAR ══ */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#000d1a;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--blue-dark);border-radius:3px;}

/* ══ MATRIX CANVAS ══ */
#matrix-bg{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;
  z-index:0;opacity:0.55;pointer-events:none;
}

/* ══ SCANLINES ══ */
#scanlines{
  pointer-events:none;position:fixed;inset:0;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(
    to bottom,transparent 0px,transparent 3px,
    rgba(0,120,255,0.04) 3px,rgba(0,120,255,0.04) 4px);
  z-index:9999;opacity:1;
}

/* ══ FLASH ══ */
#flash{
  position:fixed;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(0,170,255,0.5) 0%,transparent 70%);
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:400;
}
#flash.on{animation:flashGo 1.5s ease forwards;}
@keyframes flashGo{0%{opacity:0;}12%{opacity:1;}100%{opacity:0;}}

/* ══════════════════════════════
   INTRO SCREEN
══════════════════════════════ */
#intro{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:200;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:26px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,#000d1a 0%,#001833 100%);
  transition:opacity 1.4s ease;
}
#intro.out{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;}

.hud-corner{position:absolute;width:55px;height:55px;pointer-events:none;}
.hud-corner.tl{top:20px;left:20px;border-top:1px solid var(--blue);border-left:1px solid var(--blue);}
.hud-corner.tr{top:20px;right:20px;border-top:1px solid var(--blue);border-right:1px solid var(--blue);}
.hud-corner.bl{bottom:20px;left:20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--blue);border-left:1px solid var(--blue);}
.hud-corner.br{bottom:20px;right:20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--blue);border-right:1px solid var(--blue);}

.prod-label{
  font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;
  font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:7px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold);text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(201,162,39,0.65);
  animation:fadeUp 1.4s ease 0.3s both;
}
.main-title{
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(2.8rem,10vw,7rem);font-weight:900;
  letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--white);
  text-shadow:0 0 40px var(--blue-glow),0 0 80px rgba(0,120,255,0.2);
  animation:titleIn 1.8s ease 0.6s both;
  position:relative;
}
.main-title::after{
  content:'';display:block;height:2px;width:0%;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--blue-bright),var(--blue),transparent);
  margin-top:12px;box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--blue);
  animation:lineGrow 1.4s ease 2.4s forwards;
}
@keyframes lineGrow{to{width:100%;}}
@keyframes titleIn{
  from{opacity:0;letter-spacing:0.45em;filter:blur(6px);}
  to{opacity:1;letter-spacing:0.12em;filter:blur(0);}
}
@keyframes fadeUp{
  from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);}
  to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
}

.sys-line{
  font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;
  font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(51,204,255,0.55);
  min-height:1.2em;
}
.cursor{display:inline-block;width:7px;height:0.85em;background:var(--blue-bright);vertical-align:middle;animation:blink 0.7s step-end infinite;margin-left:2px;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0;}}

#btn-start{
  margin-top:6px;padding:14px 52px;
  background:transparent;
  border:1px solid var(--blue);color:var(--blue-bright);
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;font-size:0.72rem;
  letter-spacing:5px;text-transform:uppercase;
  cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  animation:fadeUp 1.4s ease 1.3s both;
  clip-path:polygon(10px 0%,100% 0%,calc(100% - 10px) 100%,0% 100%);
  transition:color 0.3s,box-shadow 0.3s;
}
#btn-start::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue-dark),var(--blue));
  transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;
  transition:transform 0.35s ease;z-index:-1;
}
#btn-start:hover{color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--blue-glow);}
#btn-start:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);}

/* ══════════════════════════════
   MAIN CONTENT (scrollable)
══════════════════════════════ */
#content{
  position:relative;z-index:10;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity 0.8s;
}
#content.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}

/* ── HERO ── */
#hero{
  position:relative;min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.hero-img-wrap{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transform:scale(2.5);opacity:0;filter:blur(8px);
  transition:none;
}
.hero-img-wrap.zoom-in{
  animation:heroZoom 4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) forwards;
}
@keyframes heroZoom{
  0%  {transform:scale(2.5);opacity:0;filter:blur(12px) brightness(0);}
  20% {opacity:0.3;filter:blur(4px) brightness(0.4);}
  100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;filter:blur(0) brightness(1);}
}

/* pencil sketch filter on image */
.hero-img-wrap canvas{
  width:min(90vw,520px);height:auto;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(0,170,255,0.55)) drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(0,100,200,0.3));
}

/* scan beam */
#scan-beam{
  position:absolute;left:0;right:0;height:3px;top:0;z-index:5;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--blue-bright),transparent);
  box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--blue),0 0 50px var(--blue-glow);
  opacity:0;
}
#scan-beam.go{animation:scanDown 3.2s linear 0.2s forwards;}
@keyframes scanDown{0%{top:0%;opacity:0.9;}100%{top:100%;opacity:0;}}

/* big title on hero */
#hero-title{
  position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(2.5rem,10vw,8rem);font-weight:900;
  letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:transparent;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  white-space:nowrap;z-index:6;
}
#hero-title.appear{
  animation:
    titleFlash 1.1s steps(1) forwards,
    titleMove 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.6s forwards;
}
@keyframes titleFlash{
  0%  {opacity:0;color:transparent;}
  8%  {opacity:1;color:var(--blue-bright);text-shadow:0 0 80px var(--blue-bright),0 0 160px var(--blue);letter-spacing:0.4em;}
  16% {opacity:0;}
  26% {opacity:1;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 60px var(--blue);letter-spacing:0.08em;}
  34% {opacity:0;letter-spacing:0.3em;}
  45% {opacity:1;color:var(--blue-bright);text-shadow:0 0 100px var(--blue-bright),0 0 200px var(--blue-glow);letter-spacing:0.1em;}
  60% {color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 50px var(--blue-glow);}
  100%{opacity:1;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 20px var(--blue-glow);}
}
@keyframes titleMove{
  to{top:28px;left:auto;right:28px;transform:translate(0,0);
     font-size:clamp(0.65rem,1.6vw,1rem);letter-spacing:0.22em;
     color:var(--gold);text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(201,162,39,0.7);}
}

/* ── ED FISICA subtitle ── */
#ed-fisica-sub{
  position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
  font-weight:700;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  color:transparent;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  white-space:nowrap;z-index:7;
  text-align:center;
  line-height:1.3;
}
#ed-fisica-sub .prima-parte{
  display:block;
  font-size:clamp(0.6rem,1.8vw,1rem);
  letter-spacing:0.5em;
  color:var(--blue);
}
#ed-fisica-sub .ed-fisica{
  display:block;
  font-size:clamp(2rem,7vw,5.5rem);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
}
#ed-fisica-sub.appear{
  animation:
    subFlash 1s steps(1) forwards,
    subMove 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.2s forwards;
}
@keyframes subFlash{
  0%  {opacity:0;color:transparent;}
  8%  {opacity:1;color:var(--blue-bright);text-shadow:0 0 80px var(--blue-bright),0 0 160px var(--blue);letter-spacing:0.5em;}
  18% {opacity:0;}
  30% {opacity:1;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 60px var(--blue-bright);letter-spacing:0.12em;}
  38% {opacity:0;}
  50% {opacity:1;color:var(--blue-bright);text-shadow:0 0 100px var(--blue-bright),0 0 200px var(--blue-glow);}
  68% {color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 40px var(--blue-glow);}
  100%{opacity:1;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 0 18px var(--blue-glow);}
}
@keyframes subMove{
  to{
    top:28px;left:28px;right:auto;
    transform:translate(0,0);
    font-size:inherit;
  }
}
#ed-fisica-sub.appear .prima-parte{
  animation:subPartSmall 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.2s forwards;
}
#ed-fisica-sub.appear .ed-fisica{
  animation:subEdSmall 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.2s forwards;
}
@keyframes subPartSmall{
  to{font-size:clamp(0.45rem,1vw,0.65rem);letter-spacing:0.35em;color:var(--blue);opacity:0.8;}
}
@keyframes subEdSmall{
  to{font-size:clamp(0.75rem,1.8vw,1.15rem);letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--gold-light,#f5d060);text-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(201,162,39,0.75);}
}

/* hero bottom gradient to content */
.hero-fade{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:180px;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--blue-deep));
  z-index:3;pointer-events:none;
}

/* ── SECTIONS ── */
.section{
  position:relative;z-index:10;
  max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;
  padding:80px 32px 40px;
}

.section-tag{
  font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;
  font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--blue);
  text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
}
.section-tag::before{
  content:'';display:inline-block;width:30px;height:1px;
  background:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--blue);
}

.section h2{
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(1.6rem,4vw,2.8rem);font-weight:700;
  color:var(--blue-bright);
  text-shadow:0 0 30px var(--blue-glow);
  margin-bottom:28px;line-height:1.2;
}

.section p{
  font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;
  font-size:1rem;line-height:1.85;
  color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:18px;
}
.section p strong{color:var(--blue-bright);font-weight:600;}

/* divider */
.divider{
  width:100%;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--blue-dark),transparent);
  margin:60px auto;max-width:900px;
  box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--blue-glow);
}

/* ── HOW IT WORKS CARDS ── */
.cards{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));
  gap:20px;margin-top:36px;
}
.card{
  background:rgba(0,30,60,0.7);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,120,255,0.25);
  border-top:2px solid var(--blue);
  padding:24px 22px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 12px) 0,100% 12px,100% 100%,12px 100%,0 calc(100% - 12px));
  transition:border-color 0.3s,box-shadow 0.3s,transform 0.3s;
}
.card:hover{
  border-color:var(--blue-bright);
  box-shadow:0 0 24px var(--blue-glow),inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,120,255,0.07);
  transform:translateY(-4px);
}
.card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--blue-bright),transparent);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;
}
.card:hover::before{opacity:1;}
.card-num{
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:900;
  color:rgba(0,170,255,0.15);position:absolute;top:12px;right:16px;
}
.card-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:12px;}
.card h3{
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;font-size:0.85rem;
  color:var(--blue-bright);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}
.card p{font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--dim);line-height:1.7;margin:0;}

/* ── SPORT POPUP BUTTONS ── */
.sport-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));
  gap:16px;margin-top:36px;
}
.sport-btn{
  background:rgba(0,20,50,0.8);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,120,255,0.3);
  color:var(--blue-bright);
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
  font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:3px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:22px 16px;
  cursor:pointer;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  clip-path:polygon(8px 0%,100% 0%,calc(100% - 8px) 100%,0% 100%);
  transition:all 0.3s;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;
}
.sport-btn .sport-icon{font-size:2rem;}
.sport-btn::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,120,255,0.15),transparent);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;
}
.sport-btn:hover{
  border-color:var(--blue-bright);
  box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--blue-glow);
  color:#fff;transform:translateY(-3px);
}
.sport-btn:hover::after{opacity:1;}

/* ── POPUP MODAL ── */
#modal-overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1200;
  background:rgba(0,5,15,0.88);
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity 0.35s;
  padding:20px;
}
#modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
.modal-box{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#001428,#001e3c);
  border:1px solid var(--blue-dark);
  border-top:2px solid var(--blue-bright);
  max-width:600px;width:100%;max-height:80vh;
  overflow-y:auto;
  padding:36px 32px;
  position:relative;
  clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 20px) 0,100% 20px,100% 100%,20px 100%,0 calc(100% - 20px));
  box-shadow:0 0 60px var(--blue-glow),inset 0 0 40px rgba(0,60,120,0.2);
  transform:scale(0.9) translateY(20px);
  transition:transform 0.35s ease;
}
#modal-overlay.open .modal-box{transform:scale(1) translateY(0);}
.modal-tag{
  font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;
  letter-spacing:5px;color:var(--blue);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;
}
.modal-icon{font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:10px;}
.modal-box h2{
  font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--blue-bright);margin-bottom:18px;
  text-shadow:0 0 20px var(--blue-glow);
}
.modal-box p{
  font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;font-size:0.95rem;
  line-height:1.8;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:14px;
}
.modal-box p strong{color:var(--blue-bright);}
.modal-box ul{
  list-style:none;margin:14px 0;
}
.modal-box ul li{
  font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;font-size:0.9rem;
  color:var(--dim);padding:8px 0 8px 22px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.15);
  position:relative;line-height:1.6;
}
.modal-box ul li::before{
  content:'▸';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--blue-bright);
}
.modal-close{
  position:absolute;top:16px;right:20px;
  background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(0,120,255,0.4);
  color:var(--blue-bright);font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
  font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:2px;padding:6px 14px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;
}
.modal-close:hover{background:rgba(0,120,255,0.2);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--blue-glow);}

/* scroll reveal */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity 0.7s ease,transform 0.7s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

/* ══ ROBOT MASCOT ══ */
#robot-mascot {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 30px;
  right: 24px;
  z-index: 1100;
  cursor: pointer;
  width: 90px;
  animation: robotFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(0,170,255,0.6));
  transition: filter 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  user-select: none;
}
#robot-mascot:hover {
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 22px rgba(0,200,255,0.95));
  transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-4px);
}
@keyframes robotFloat {
  0%,100%{ transform: translateY(0px) rotate(-1deg); }
  50%    { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(1deg); }
}
/* speech bubble */
#robot-bubble {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 130px;
  right: 20px;
  background: rgba(0,15,35,0.95);
  border: 1px solid var(--blue-bright);
  border-radius: 14px 14px 4px 14px;
  padding: 0;
  width: 0; height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  opacity: 0;
  z-index: 1099;
  box-shadow: 0 0 24px var(--blue-glow);
  transition: opacity 0.3s;
  pointer-events: none;
}
#robot-bubble.show {
  width: auto; height: auto;
  opacity: 1;
  pointer-events: all;
  padding: 18px 20px 16px;
  min-width: 220px; max-width: 300px;
  animation: bubblePop 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;
}
@keyframes bubblePop {
  from { transform: scale(0.7) translateY(10px); opacity: 0; }
  to   { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
}
#robot-bubble::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; bottom: -10px; right: 28px;
  border-left: 10px solid transparent;
  border-right: 0px solid transparent;
  border-top: 10px solid var(--blue-bright);
}
.bubble-tag {
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.52rem; letter-spacing: 4px;
  color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.bubble-text {
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--white);
}
.bubble-text strong { color: var(--blue-bright); }
.bubble-close {
  position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 10px;
  background: transparent; border: none;
  color: var(--blue); font-size: 0.75rem;
  cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.bubble-close:hover { color: #fff; }
/* antenna blink */
#robot-mascot .antenna-dot {
  animation: antennaBlink 1.2s step-end infinite;
}
@keyframes antennaBlink {
  0%,100%{ opacity:1; } 50%{ opacity:0; }
}

/* sport image in button */
.sport-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 90px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  opacity: 0.75;
  filter: brightness(0.8) saturate(0.7) hue-rotate(170deg);
  transition: opacity 0.3s, filter 0.3s;
  display: block;
}
.sport-btn:hover .sport-img {
  opacity: 1;
  filter: brightness(1) saturate(1.1) hue-rotate(170deg);
}

/* prosegui button */
#btn-prosegui {
  position: relative;
  padding: 18px 70px;
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid var(--blue-bright);
  color: var(--blue-bright);
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip-path: polygon(14px 0%,100% 0%,calc(100% - 14px) 100%,0% 100%);
  transition: color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
  animation: proseguiPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
#btn-prosegui::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blue-dark), var(--blue));
  transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
  transition: transform 0.4s ease; z-index: -1;
}
#btn-prosegui:hover { color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 40px var(--blue-glow), 0 0 80px rgba(0,100,255,0.3); }
#btn-prosegui:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
@keyframes proseguiPulse {
  0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--blue-glow); }
  50%      { box-shadow: 0 0 28px var(--blue-bright), 0 0 50px var(--blue-glow); }
}

/* LE PROTESI hero text */
#le-protesi-hero {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 18%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(15px);
  z-index: 7;
  text-align: center;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity 1s ease, transform 1s ease;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
#le-protesi-hero.show {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
}
#le-protesi-hero .lp-tag {
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.58rem;
  letter-spacing: 6px;
  color: var(--blue);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  display: block;
}
#le-protesi-hero .lp-title {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 5.5vw, 3.5rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.22em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #fff;
  text-shadow: 0 0 30px var(--blue-glow), 0 0 70px rgba(0,120,255,0.35);
  display: block;
}

/* ══ PART 2 TRANSITION ══ */
#part2-overlay {
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 1000;
  background: #000d1a;
  opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}
#neuron-bg-canvas {
  position: fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%;
  z-index: 0; opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity 2s ease;
}
#neuron-bg-canvas.show { opacity: 0.42; }
#part2-overlay.active { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }

#neuron-question {
  position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 4.5vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--blue-bright);
  text-align: center;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 50px var(--blue-bright), 0 0 100px var(--blue-glow);
  opacity: 0;
  padding: 0 40px;
  z-index: 20;
  width: 90%;
  max-width: 750px;
  pointer-events: none;
  line-height: 1.4;
}
#neuron-question.show { animation: questionIn 0.8s ease forwards; }
#neuron-question.hide { animation: questionOut 0.6s ease forwards; }
@keyframes questionIn {
  from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(20px); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes questionOut {
  from { opacity:1; }
  to   { opacity:0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
}

/* brain canvas */
#brain-wrap {
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  opacity: 0; z-index: 4;
  pointer-events: none;
}
#brain-wrap.show { animation: heroZoom 4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) forwards; }
#brain-wrap.settled {
  opacity: 0;
  animation: none;
  pointer-events: none;
}
/* brain inside scroll content */
#brain-scroll-img {
  display: block;
  width: min(80vw, 480px);
  height: auto;
  margin: 40px auto 20px;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(0,170,255,0.6)) drop-shadow(0 0 50px rgba(0,100,200,0.4));
  opacity: 0;
  transform: scale(0.92);
  transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
}
#brain-scroll-img.show {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: scale(1);
}
#brain-canvas {
  width: min(70vw, 420px);
  height: auto;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(0,170,255,0.6)) drop-shadow(0 0 50px rgba(0,100,200,0.4));
}

/* seconda parte title */
#seconda-parte {
  position: fixed; top:50%; left:50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.5rem,9vw,7rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: transparent; opacity: 0;
  white-space: nowrap; z-index: 6; pointer-events: none;
  text-align: center; line-height: 1.3;
}
#seconda-parte .sp-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0;
  letter-spacing: 0.5em;
  color: var(--blue);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: all 0.9s ease;
}
#seconda-parte .sp-main {
  display: block;
}
#seconda-parte.appear {
  animation:
    titleFlash 1.1s steps(1) forwards,
    sp-moveLeft 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.6s forwards;
}
@keyframes sp-moveLeft {
  to {
    top: 22px; left: 28px; right: auto;
    transform: translate(0,0);
    font-size: clamp(0.65rem,1.6vw,1rem);
    letter-spacing: 0.22em;
    color: var(--gold);
    text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(201,162,39,0.7);
  }
}
#seconda-parte.appear .sp-label {
  animation: subPartSmall 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.6s forwards;
}
#seconda-parte.appear .sp-main {
  animation: spMainSmall 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.6s forwards;
}
@keyframes spMainSmall {
  to { font-size: clamp(0.7rem,1.6vw,1rem); letter-spacing:0.22em; color: var(--gold); text-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(201,162,39,0.75); }
}

/* I NEURONI title after seconda-parte moves */
#i-neuroni {
  position: fixed; top:50%; left:50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.4rem,5vw,3.8rem);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: transparent; opacity: 0;
  white-space: nowrap; z-index: 6; pointer-events: none;
  text-align: center;
}
#i-neuroni.appear {
  animation:
    titleFlash 1.1s steps(1) forwards,
    ineuroniMove 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) 3.6s forwards;
}
@keyframes ineuroniMove {
  to {
    top: 22px; left: auto; right: 28px;
    transform: translate(0,0);
    font-size: clamp(0.65rem,1.6vw,1rem);
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    color: var(--gold);
    text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(201,162,39,0.7);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
}

/* ══ NEURON CONTENT SECTIONS ══ */
.n-section {
  position: relative; z-index: 5;
  margin-bottom: 70px;
}
.n-h2 {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2.6rem); font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--blue-bright);
  text-shadow: 0 0 30px var(--blue-glow);
  margin-bottom: 24px; line-height: 1.2;
}
.n-p {
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.85;
  color: var(--dim); margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.n-p strong { color: var(--blue-bright); font-weight: 600; }
.n-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px,1fr));
  gap: 18px; margin-top: 28px;
}
.n-card {
  background: rgba(0,20,50,0.75);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,150,255,0.25);
  border-top: 2px solid var(--blue);
  padding: 22px 20px;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 10px) 0,100% 10px,100% 100%,10px 100%,0 calc(100% - 10px));
  transition: border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
}
.n-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--blue-bright);
  box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--blue-glow);
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}
.n-card-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.n-card h3 {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--blue-bright); letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.n-card p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; }
.reveal2 { opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease; }
.reveal2.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }

/* neuron info box */
.n-info-box {
  background: rgba(0,15,40,0.8);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,120,255,0.3);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--blue-bright);
  padding: 20px 24px;
  margin-top: 24px;
}
.n-info-row {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.12);
  flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
}
.n-info-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.n-info-label {
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
  color: var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.n-info-val {
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--white);
}
.n-info-val strong { color: var(--blue-bright); }

/* step list */
.n-step-list { margin-top: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
.n-step {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 18px;
  background: rgba(0,15,40,0.6);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.2);
  padding: 16px 20px;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 8px) 0,100% 8px,100% 100%,0 100%);
  transition: border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
}
.n-step:hover { border-color: var(--blue); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--blue-glow); }
.n-step-num {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--blue-bright);
  min-width: 34px; line-height: 1.5;
}
.n-step div {
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.7;
  color: var(--dim);
}
.n-step div strong { color: var(--blue-bright); }

/* ══ INTERACTIVE ELEMENTS ══ */

/* Hover tooltip cards */
.tooltip-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-block; cursor: help; }
.tooltip-wrap .tip {
  visibility: hidden; opacity: 0;
  position: absolute; bottom: 130%; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: rgba(0,15,40,0.97);
  border: 1px solid var(--blue);
  color: var(--white);
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem; line-height: 1.6;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  width: 220px;
  z-index: 500;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
  pointer-events: none;
  text-align: left;
  box-shadow: 0 0 16px var(--blue-glow);
}
.tooltip-wrap:hover .tip { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; }
.tooltip-wrap .tip::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  border: 6px solid transparent;
  border-top-color: var(--blue);
}
.highlight-word {
  color: var(--blue-bright);
  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--blue);
  cursor: help;
  transition: text-shadow 0.2s;
}
.highlight-word:hover { text-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--blue-bright); }

/* Quiz widget */
.quiz-box {
  background: rgba(0,12,32,0.9);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,120,255,0.3);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--blue-bright);
  padding: 28px 26px;
  margin-top: 32px;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 12px) 0,100% 12px,100% 100%,0 100%);
}
.quiz-box h3 {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.8rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: var(--blue-bright); text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.quiz-question { font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 16px; line-height: 1.6; }
.quiz-options { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.quiz-opt {
  background: rgba(0,20,50,0.7);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.3);
  color: var(--dim);
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 12px 18px;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: left;
  clip-path: polygon(6px 0%,100% 0%,calc(100% - 6px) 100%,0% 100%);
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.quiz-opt:hover { border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--white); box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--blue-glow); }
.quiz-opt.correct { border-color: #00ff88; color: #00ff88; background: rgba(0,80,40,0.4); pointer-events: none; }
.quiz-opt.wrong   { border-color: #ff4444; color: #ff4444; background: rgba(80,0,0,0.4); pointer-events: none; }
.quiz-feedback {
  margin-top: 14px; padding: 12px 16px;
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 1px;
  display: none; border-radius: 4px;
}
.quiz-feedback.show { display: block; }
.quiz-feedback.ok  { background: rgba(0,80,40,0.3); color: #00ff88; border: 1px solid #00ff88; }
.quiz-feedback.ko  { background: rgba(80,0,0,0.3);  color: #ff6666; border: 1px solid #ff4444; }
.quiz-next {
  display: none; margin-top: 14px;
  background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--blue);
  color: var(--blue-bright); font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 3px; padding: 10px 28px;
  cursor: pointer; clip-path: polygon(8px 0%,100% 0%,calc(100% - 8px) 100%,0% 100%);
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.quiz-next:hover { background: rgba(0,100,200,0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 14px var(--blue-glow); }
.quiz-next.show { display: inline-block; }

/* Timeline interactive */
.timeline { margin-top: 28px; position: relative; }
.timeline::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute;
  left: 20px; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--blue-bright), transparent);
}
.tl-item {
  position: relative; padding: 0 0 28px 52px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.tl-dot {
  position: absolute; left: 13px; top: 4px;
  width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--blue-dark); border: 2px solid var(--blue-bright);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--blue-glow);
  transition: all 0.3s;
}
.tl-item:hover .tl-dot, .tl-item.active .tl-dot {
  background: var(--blue-bright); box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--blue-bright);
}
.tl-year {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--blue); letter-spacing: 3px; margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.tl-title {
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.tl-desc {
  font-family: 'Exo 2', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--dim); line-height: 1.6;
  max-height: 0; overflow: hidden;
  transition: max-height 0.4s ease;
}
.tl-item.active .tl-desc { max-height: 200px; }

/* Progress bar animated */
.stat-bars { margin-top: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
.stat-bar-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.stat-bar-label {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--blue); letter-spacing: 2px;
}
.stat-bar-track {
  height: 6px; background: rgba(0,50,100,0.4);
  border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;
}
.stat-bar-fill {
  height: 100%; width: 0%; border-radius: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--blue-dark), var(--blue-bright));
  box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--blue-glow);
  transition: width 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
}
.stat-bar-fill.animated { width: var(--target-w); }

/* Neuron interactive diagram labels */
.neuron-diagram {
  position: relative; margin: 28px auto;
  width: min(90vw, 500px);
}
.neuron-diagram canvas { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
.neuron-label {
  position: absolute; background: rgba(0,10,30,0.9);
  border: 1px solid var(--blue); color: var(--blue-bright);
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem;
  letter-spacing: 2px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 2px;
  cursor: pointer; pointer-events: all;
  transition: all 0.2s; white-space: nowrap;
}
.neuron-label:hover { background: rgba(0,80,200,0.4); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--blue-glow); }
.neuron-label::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; right: -16px;
  width: 14px; height: 1px; background: var(--blue);
}

/* ══ 3D ARM WIDGET ══ */
.arm-widget {
  background: rgba(0,10,28,0.95);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,150,255,0.35);
  border-top: 2px solid var(--blue-bright);
  padding: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 14px) 0,100% 14px,100% 100%,14px 100%,0 calc(100% - 14px));
  box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,100,255,0.15);
  margin-top: 32px;
}
.arm-widget-header {
  background: rgba(0,20,50,0.9);
  padding: 14px 22px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.2);
}
.arm-widget-header span {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 4px;
  color: var(--blue-bright); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.arm-canvas-wrap {
  position: relative; width: 100%; height: 340px;
  cursor: grab; user-select: none;
}
.arm-canvas-wrap:active { cursor: grabbing; }
#arm-canvas { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; }
.arm-hint {
  position: absolute; bottom: 10px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: rgba(0,170,255,0.5); pointer-events: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.arm-controls {
  padding: 16px 20px;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.2);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;
}
.arm-main-btns {
  display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.arm-btn {
  flex: 1; min-width: 110px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  background: rgba(0,20,55,0.8);
  border: 1px solid var(--blue-dark);
  color: var(--blue-bright);
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
  text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer;
  clip-path: polygon(6px 0%,100% 0%,calc(100% - 6px) 100%,0% 100%);
  transition: all 0.25s;
}
.arm-btn:hover, .arm-btn.active {
  background: rgba(0,80,200,0.35);
  border-color: var(--blue-bright);
  box-shadow: 0 0 14px var(--blue-glow);
}
.arm-sub-panel {
  display: none; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: rgba(0,10,30,0.8);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,80,180,0.2);
  border-radius: 2px;
}
.arm-sub-panel.show { display: flex; }
.finger-btn, .action-btn {
  padding: 9px 14px;
  background: rgba(0,15,40,0.9);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.35);
  color: var(--dim);
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
  cursor: pointer;
  clip-path: polygon(5px 0%,100% 0%,calc(100% - 5px) 100%,0% 100%);
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.finger-btn:hover, .finger-btn.selected {
  border-color: var(--blue-bright); color: #fff;
  background: rgba(0,60,160,0.4);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--blue-glow);
}
.action-btn {
  background: rgba(0,30,80,0.8);
  border-color: var(--blue);
  color: var(--blue-bright);
  font-size: 0.7rem; padding: 10px 20px;
}
.action-btn:hover {
  background: rgba(0,80,200,0.3);
  box-shadow: 0 0 14px var(--blue-glow);
}
.arm-status {
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: rgba(0,200,255,0.5); padding: 0 4px;
}

/* ══ NEURON TOUCH WIDGET ══ */
.neuron-widget {
  background: rgba(0,5,20,0.97);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,150,255,0.35);
  border-top: 2px solid var(--blue-bright);
  overflow: hidden;
  clip-path: polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 14px) 0,100% 14px,100% 100%,14px 100%,0 calc(100% - 14px));
  box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,100,255,0.15);
  margin-top: 32px;
}
.neuron-widget-header {
  background: rgba(0,15,40,0.9);
  padding: 14px 22px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,100,200,0.2);
}
.neuron-widget-header span {
  font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 4px;
  color: var(--blue-bright); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.neuron-canvas-wrap {
  position: relative; width: 100%;
  height: min(55vw, 380px);
  touch-action: none;
  overflow: hidden;
}
#neuron-touch-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover; opacity: 0.55;
  pointer-events: none;
}
#neuron-touch-canvas {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
}
.neuron-hint {
  position: absolute; bottom: 10px; left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  font-family: 'Share Tech Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: rgba(0,200,255,0.5); pointer-events: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="matrix-bg"></canvas>
<div id="scanlines"></div>
<div id="flash"></div>

<!-- ══ INTRO ══ -->
<div id="intro">
  <div class="hud-corner tl"></div><div class="hud-corner tr"></div>
  <div class="hud-corner bl"></div><div class="hud-corner br"></div>
  <p class="prod-label">✦ from Christian Caruso Production ✦</p>
  <h1 class="main-title">La Robotica</h1>
  <p class="sys-line" id="sys-line"><span class="cursor"></span></p>
  <button id="btn-start" onclick="startPresentation()">Inizia Presentazione</button>
</div>

<!-- ══ MAIN CONTENT ══ -->
<div id="content">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div id="hero">
    <div class="hero-img-wrap" id="hero-wrap">
      <canvas id="sketch-canvas"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div id="scan-beam"></div>
    <div id="hero-title">LA ROBOTICA</div>
    <div id="ed-fisica-sub">
      <span class="prima-parte">PRIMA PARTE</span>
      <span class="ed-fisica">ED FISICA</span>
    </div>
    <div id="le-protesi-hero" class="le-protesi-block"></div>
    <div class="hero-fade"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- SECTION 1: Cosa sono le protesi -->
  <div class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 01</div>
    <h2>Cosa sono le Protesi?</h2>
    <p>Una <strong>protesi</strong> è un dispositivo artificiale progettato per sostituire una parte del corpo mancante o non funzionante. Nate come semplici ausili in legno, oggi le protesi sono <strong>capolavori di ingegneria robotica</strong> che integrano sensori, motori e intelligenza artificiale per imitare i movimenti naturali del corpo umano.</p>
    <p>Le protesi moderne rappresentano il punto di incontro tra <strong>biologia e tecnologia</strong>: vengono indossate, ma in molti casi vengono anche "sentite", grazie a sistemi di feedback sensoriale che trasmettono informazioni tattili al sistema nervoso.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- SECTION 2: Come funzionano -->
  <div class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 02</div>
    <h2>Come Funzionano?</h2>
    <p>Le protesi robotiche moderne si basano su più tecnologie integrate. Il cervello invia <strong>segnali elettrici ai muscoli</strong> — anche a quelli di un arto amputato — e questi segnali vengono captati da elettrodi sulla pelle. Un microprocessore li interpreta e ordina ai motori della protesi di muoversi.</p>
    <div class="cards">
      <div class="card"><span class="card-num">01</span><div class="card-icon">⚡</div><h3>Segnali EMG</h3><p>Elettromiografia: elettrodi captano l'attività elettrica dei muscoli residui e la trasformano in comandi di movimento.</p></div>
      <div class="card"><span class="card-num">02</span><div class="card-icon">🧠</div><h3>Microprocessore</h3><p>Un chip interpreta i segnali in tempo reale, applica algoritmi di AI e calcola il movimento ottimale della protesi.</p></div>
      <div class="card"><span class="card-num">03</span><div class="card-icon">⚙️</div><h3>Attuatori</h3><p>Motori elettrici ultra-leggeri e servomotori eseguono i movimenti con precisione millimetrica e forza controllata.</p></div>
      <div class="card"><span class="card-num">04</span><div class="card-icon">📡</div><h3>Sensori</h3><p>Sensori di pressione, accelerometri e giroscopi forniscono al processore dati continui su posizione, forza e equilibrio.</p></div>
      <div class="card"><span class="card-num">05</span><div class="card-icon">🔁</div><h3>Feedback</h3><p>Sistemi di ritorno sensoriale stimolano i nervi per simulare il tatto, permettendo di "sentire" ciò che la mano tocca.</p></div>
      <div class="card"><span class="card-num">06</span><div class="card-icon">🔋</div><h3>Batteria</h3><p>Batterie al litio ricaricabili garantiscono autonomia di 12-24 ore per uso quotidiano intensivo.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <!-- 3D ROBOTIC ARM WIDGET -->
  <div class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">LABORATORIO INTERATTIVO</div>
    <h2>Braccio Bionco 3D — Interattivo</h2>
    <p style="font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:0;">
      Trascina per ruotare il braccio. Seleziona <strong style="color:var(--blue-bright)">Dita</strong> o <strong style="color:var(--blue-bright)">Braccio</strong> per controllare i movimenti.
    </p>
    <div class="arm-widget">
      <div class="arm-widget-header">
        <span>🦾 PROTESI BIONICA — SISTEMA DI CONTROLLO</span>
      </div>
      <div class="arm-canvas-wrap" id="arm-canvas-wrap">
        <canvas id="arm-canvas"></canvas>
        <div class="arm-hint">↔ TRASCINA PER RUOTARE</div>
      </div>
      <div class="arm-controls">
        <div class="arm-status" id="arm-status">SISTEMA PRONTO ▸ SELEZIONA UN'AZIONE</div>
        <div class="arm-main-btns">
          <button class="arm-btn" id="btn-dita" onclick="showFingers()">🖐 DITA</button>
          <button class="arm-btn" id="btn-braccio" onclick="showArm()">💪 BRACCIO</button>
        </div>
        <!-- Finger sub-panel -->
        <div class="arm-sub-panel" id="finger-panel">
          <button class="finger-btn" onclick="selectFinger(0,this)">👍 POLLICE</button>
          <button class="finger-btn" onclick="selectFinger(1,this)">☝️ INDICE</button>
          <button class="finger-btn" onclick="selectFinger(2,this)">🖕 MEDIO</button>
          <button class="finger-btn" onclick="selectFinger(3,this)">💍 ANULARE</button>
          <button class="finger-btn" onclick="selectFinger(4,this)">🤙 MIGNOLO</button>
        </div>
        <!-- Finger action -->
        <div class="arm-sub-panel" id="finger-action-panel">
          <button class="action-btn" id="finger-action-btn" onclick="toggleFinger()">▶ APRI DITO</button>
        </div>
        <!-- Arm action -->
        <div class="arm-sub-panel" id="arm-action-panel">
          <button class="action-btn" id="arm-action-btn" onclick="toggleArm()">▶ APRI BRACCIO</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- QUIZ PART 1 -->
  <div class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">TEST INTERATTIVO</div>
    <h2>Metti alla Prova le tue Conoscenze</h2>
    <div class="quiz-box" id="quiz1">
      <h3>⚡ QUIZ — LE PROTESI</h3>
      <div class="quiz-question" id="q1-text"></div>
      <div class="quiz-options" id="q1-opts"></div>
      <div class="quiz-feedback" id="q1-fb"></div>
      <button class="quiz-next" id="q1-next" onclick="nextQ1()">PROSSIMA DOMANDA ▶</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TIMELINE STORIA PROTESI -->
  <div class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">STORIA INTERATTIVA</div>
    <h2>L'Evoluzione delle Protesi</h2>
    <p class="section p" style="font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:8px;">Clicca su ogni tappa per espandere i dettagli:</p>
    <div class="timeline" id="tl-protesi">
      <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleTl(this)">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-year">950 A.C.</div>
        <div class="tl-title">Il primo alluce artificiale</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Trovato su una mummia egizia: un alluce in legno e cuoio. Probabilmente funzionale per camminare con i sandali tipici dell'epoca.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleTl(this)">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-year">1500 D.C.</div>
        <div class="tl-title">Il braccio di ferro di Götz von Berlichingen</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Cavaliere tedesco che perse il braccio in battaglia. Si fece costruire una mano meccanica in ferro con dita articolate che poteva tenere la spada.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleTl(this)">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-year">1800</div>
        <div class="tl-title">Le guerre napoleoniche e le protesi in legno</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">L'enorme numero di amputazioni durante le guerre spinse lo sviluppo delle prime protesi standardizzate. Dominique Jean Larrey, chirurgo di Napoleone, standardizzò le tecniche di amputazione.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleTl(this)">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-year">1945</div>
        <div class="tl-title">La rivoluzione post-bellica</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Dopo la Seconda Guerra Mondiale, l'enorme numero di veterani con amputazioni spinse gli USA a investire milioni nella ricerca sulle protesi. Nasce la protesi mioeelettrica.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleTl(this)">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-year">1996</div>
        <div class="tl-title">Le Paralimpiadi di Atlanta e la Cheetah Blade</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">La lama in fibra di carbonio di Össur fa il suo debutto olimpico. Rivoluziona le protesi sportive e dimostra che si può competere ai massimi livelli con una protesi.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleTl(this)">
        <div class="tl-dot"></div>
        <div class="tl-year">2024</div>
        <div class="tl-title">Protesi neurali e intelligenza artificiale</div>
        <div class="tl-desc">Le protesi moderne leggono i segnali del cervello in tempo reale. Il progetto Neuralink ha impiantato chip cerebrali in pazienti umani, permettendo controllo di dispositivi col solo pensiero.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- SECTION 3: Sport -->
  <div class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 03</div>
    <h2>Protesi e Sport</h2>
    <p>Le protesi non limitano più la vita sportiva — al contrario, la <strong>moltiplicano</strong>. Atleti con protesi competono ai massimi livelli mondiali, e le tecnologie sviluppate per lo sport si riverberano nelle protesi quotidiane. Scopri come le protesi cambiano ogni disciplina:</p>
    <div class="sport-grid">
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openModal('corsa')">
        <img class="sport-img" src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4e/2012_Summer_Paralympics_100m_T44_Men_final.jpg/320px-2012_Summer_Paralympics_100m_T44_Men_final.jpg" alt="Corsa con protesi" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
        <span class="sport-icon">🏃</span>CORSA
      </button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openModal('nuoto')">
        <img class="sport-img" src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1e/Jessica_Long_2012_Paralympics.jpg/320px-Jessica_Long_2012_Paralympics.jpg" alt="Nuoto con protesi" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
        <span class="sport-icon">🏊</span>NUOTO
      </button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openModal('ciclismo')">
        <img class="sport-img" src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5c/2016_Summer_Paralympics%2C_cycling_road%2C_men%27s_time_trial_C1-2-3.jpg/320px-2016_Summer_Paralympics%2C_cycling_road%2C_men%27s_time_trial_C1-2-3.jpg" alt="Ciclismo con protesi" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
        <span class="sport-icon">🚴</span>CICLISMO
      </button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openModal('basket')">
        <img class="sport-img" src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/80/2012_Summer_Paralympics_wheelchair_basketball_USA_vs_GB.jpg/320px-2012_Summer_Paralympics_wheelchair_basketball_USA_vs_GB.jpg" alt="Basket con protesi" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
        <span class="sport-icon">🏀</span>BASKET
      </button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openModal('scherma')">
        <img class="sport-img" src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/82/Bebe_Vio_-_2016_Summer_Paralympics.jpg/320px-Bebe_Vio_-_2016_Summer_Paralympics.jpg" alt="Scherma con protesi" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
        <span class="sport-icon">🤺</span>SCHERMA
      </button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openModal('arrampicata')">
        <img class="sport-img" src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/31/2016_Summer_Paralympics_-_Wheelchair_Tennis_%2829042091654%29.jpg/320px-2016_Summer_Paralympics_-_Wheelchair_Tennis_%2829042091654%29.jpg" alt="Sport con protesi" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
        <span class="sport-icon">🧗</span>ARRAMPICATA
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="divider"></div>

  <!-- SECTION 4: Futuro -->
  <div class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 04</div>
    <h2>Il Futuro delle Protesi</h2>
    <p>La ricerca sta portando le protesi verso frontiere fantascientifiche. Le <strong>interfacce neurali dirette</strong> (come BrainGate) permettono di controllare una protesi con il pensiero puro, senza alcun movimento muscolare. Le protesi bioniche del futuro avranno pelle sintetica con sensori termici, saranno stampate in 3D su misura e si ricaricheranno wirelessly.</p>
    <p>Il confine tra robotica e biologia si assottiglia ogni anno: presto non parleremo più di "persone con protesi", ma di <strong>esseri umani potenziati</strong> — cyborg nella realtà, non solo nella fantascienza.</p>
  </div>

  <div style="height:60px;"></div>
  <!-- PROSEGUI BUTTON -->
  <div style="text-align:center;padding:40px 20px 80px;position:relative;z-index:10;">
    <div style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--blue);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;opacity:0.7;">── FINE PRIMA PARTE ──</div>
    <button id="btn-prosegui" onclick="prosegui()">
      <span class="btn-glow-line"></span>
      PROSEGUI
      <span style="margin-left:12px;font-size:1rem;">▶</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MODAL ══ -->
<div id="modal-overlay" onclick="closeModalOutside(event)">
  <div class="modal-box" id="modal-box">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">✕ CHIUDI</button>
    <div class="modal-tag" id="m-tag"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon" id="m-icon"></div>
    <h2 id="m-title"></h2>
    <div id="m-body"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ══ MATRIX RAIN ══
(function(){
  const c = document.getElementById('matrix-bg');
  const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
  function resize(){ c.width=window.innerWidth; c.height=window.innerHeight; }
  resize(); window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
  const chars = 'アイウエオカキクケコ0123456789ABCDEF{}[]<>/\\=+-*;:.,int void return if else class while for import export const let var function async await true false null';
  const fontSize = 13;
  let cols = Math.floor(c.width/fontSize);
  let drops = Array(cols).fill(1);
  setInterval(()=>{
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,8,20,0.04)';
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
    cols = Math.floor(c.width/fontSize);
    while(drops.length < cols) drops.push(1);
    for(let i=0;i<cols;i++){
      const ch = chars[Math.floor(Math.random()*chars.length)];
      // head: bright blue-white
      ctx.fillStyle = Math.random()>0.95 ? '#ffffff' : (Math.random()>0.6 ? '#33ccff' : '#00aaff');
      ctx.font = fontSize+'px "Share Tech Mono",monospace';
      ctx.fillText(ch, i*fontSize, drops[i]*fontSize);
      if(drops[i]*fontSize > c.height && Math.random()>0.975) drops[i]=0;
      drops[i]++;
    }
  }, 42);
})();

// ══ TYPING ══
const sysLines=['SYSTEM BOOT... OK','LOADING ROBOTICS MODULE...','NEURAL INTERFACE READY.','PRESS START >>'];
let li=0,ci=0;
const sysEl=document.getElementById('sys-line');
function typeNext(){
  const txt=sysLines[li%sysLines.length];
  if(ci<=txt.length){
    sysEl.innerHTML=txt.slice(0,ci)+'<span class="cursor"></span>';
    ci++; setTimeout(typeNext,60);
  } else { setTimeout(()=>{li++;ci=0;typeNext();},1600); }
}
setTimeout(typeNext,1000);

// ══ SKETCH CANVAS (pencil effect on image) ══
function drawSketch(){
  const img = new Image();
  img.onload = function(){
    const canvas = document.getElementById('sketch-canvas');
    const maxW = Math.min(window.innerWidth*0.85, 520);
    const scale = maxW / img.width;
    canvas.width  = img.width  * scale;
    canvas.height = img.height * scale;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    // draw image
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    const imgData = ctx.getImageData(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
    const d = imgData.data;
    const w = canvas.width, h = canvas.height;

    // edge detection (Sobel-like) for pencil sketch
    const gray = new Uint8Array(w*h);
    for(let i=0;i<w*h;i++){
      gray[i] = 0.299*d[i*4]+0.587*d[i*4+1]+0.114*d[i*4+2];
    }

    // output: white bg, blue-white lines
    const out = ctx.createImageData(w, h);
    const o = out.data;

    for(let y=1;y<h-1;y++){
      for(let x=1;x<w-1;x++){
        // sobel
        const gx =
          -gray[(y-1)*w+(x-1)] + gray[(y-1)*w+(x+1)]
          -2*gray[y*w+(x-1)]   + 2*gray[y*w+(x+1)]
          -gray[(y+1)*w+(x-1)] + gray[(y+1)*w+(x+1)];
        const gy =
          -gray[(y-1)*w+(x-1)] - 2*gray[(y-1)*w+x] - gray[(y-1)*w+(x+1)]
          +gray[(y+1)*w+(x-1)] + 2*gray[(y+1)*w+x] + gray[(y+1)*w+(x+1)];
        let mag = Math.sqrt(gx*gx+gy*gy);
        mag = Math.min(255, mag * 1.6);

        const idx = (y*w+x)*4;
        // transparent background, blue-tinted lines
        if(mag > 18){
          const intensity = Math.min(255, mag * 1.4);
          o[idx]   = Math.max(0, 200 - intensity*0.3); // R: slightly blue
          o[idx+1] = Math.max(0, 220 - intensity*0.2); // G
          o[idx+2] = 255;                               // B: full blue
          o[idx+3] = Math.min(255, intensity * 1.3);   // alpha
        } else {
          o[idx]=o[idx+1]=o[idx+2]=0; o[idx+3]=0; // transparent
        }
      }
    }
    ctx.putImageData(out, 0, 0);
  };
  img.src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,';
}
drawSketch();

// ══ AUDIO ══
function buildAudio(){
  const ac = new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
  const now = ac.currentTime;
  function tone(f,s,d,t='sine',v=0.07){
    const o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();
    o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f,now+s);
    g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);
    g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v,now+s+0.06);
    g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);
    o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+0.1);
  }
  function sweep(f0,f1,s,d,t='sine',v=0.05){
    const o=ac.createOscillator(),g=ac.createGain();
    o.type=t;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f0,now+s);
    o.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(f1,now+s+d);
    g.gain.setValueAtTime(0,now+s);
    g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(v,now+s+0.07);
    g.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0,now+s+d);
    o.connect(g);g.connect(ac.destination);o.start(now+s);o.stop(now+s+d+0.1);
  }
  // boot clicks
  [220,440,660,880,1100,1320,880,440].forEach((f,i)=>tone(f,i*0.15,0.12,'square',0.025));
  sweep(60,350,1,3.5,'sawtooth',0.04);
  sweep(350,1400,1,3,'sine',0.045);
  tone(80,1.2,1.5,'triangle',0.09);
  tone(160,1.6,1,'sine',0.07);
  sweep(200,50,2.5,2,'sawtooth',0.04);
  tone(55,3,1,'triangle',0.1);
  sweep(100,1400,3.8,0.7,'sine',0.08);
  // stinger
  [1760,880,440].forEach((f,i)=>tone(f,4.5+i*0.1,0.1,'square',0.035));
  sweep(1500,180,4.55,1,'sine',0.09);
  tone(110,4.7,0.6,'triangle',0.11);
  for(let i=0;i<5;i++) tone(1800-i*180,4.5+i*0.11,0.05,'square',0.018);
}

// ══ START ══
function startPresentation(){
  buildAudio();
  document.getElementById('intro').classList.add('out');
  setTimeout(()=>{
    document.getElementById('intro').style.display='none';
    const content = document.getElementById('content');
    content.classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(()=>{
      document.getElementById('hero-wrap').classList.add('zoom-in');
      document.getElementById('scan-beam').classList.add('go');
    },100);
    setTimeout(()=>{
      document.getElementById('flash').classList.add('on');
      document.getElementById('hero-title').classList.add('appear');
      setTimeout(()=>{ document.getElementById('ed-fisica-sub').classList.add('appear'); setTimeout(showLeProtesi, 6200); }, 4800);
    },4500);
    // scroll reveals
    initReveal();
  },1400);
}

function initReveal(){
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{
      if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); }
    });
  },{threshold:0.12});
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
}

// ══ MODAL DATA ══
const sports = {
  corsa:{icon:'🏃',tag:'ATLETICA LEGGERA',title:'Protesi nella Corsa',body:`
    <p>Le protesi da corsa sono tra le più spettacolari della biomedica. La <strong>Cheetah Blade</strong> di Össur — usata da Oscar Pistorius — è realizzata in fibra di carbonio e funziona come una molla biologica: immagazzina energia durante l'appoggio e la rilascia nella spinta.</p>
    <p>Non hanno articolazione della caviglia: la forma a "C" rovesciata distribuisce il peso e garantisce ritorno elastico ottimale. Alcuni atleti paralimpici corrono i 100m in meno di 11 secondi.</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Fibra di carbonio ad alta resistenza, peso sotto 500g</li>
      <li>Assorbimento e rilascio energetico fino all'80%</li>
      <li>Personalizzate per peso corporeo e stile di corsa</li>
      <li>Usate nei Giochi Paralimpici fin dal 1996</li>
    </ul>
  `},
  nuoto:{icon:'🏊',tag:'SPORT ACQUATICI',title:'Protesi nel Nuoto',body:`
    <p>Il nuoto è uno degli sport dove le protesi cambiano più radicalmente il design. Poiché l'acqua richiede idrodinamica, le protesi per il nuoto sono <strong>lame o palette</strong> in silicone o titanio pensate per ridurre la resistenza e aumentare la spinta.</p>
    <p>Nuotatori come <strong>Jessica Long</strong> (13 medaglie d'oro paralimpiche) usano protesi progettate a computerper ottimizzare il movimento nell'acqua, con forme ispirate alle pinne dei delfini.</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Materiali idrofobi resistenti alla corrosione salina</li>
      <li>Forme idrodinamiche testate in vasca e tunnel del vento</li>
      <li>Sistemi di attacco waterproof con ventosa a pressione</li>
      <li>Alcune consentono anche immersioni subacquee</li>
    </ul>
  `},
  ciclismo:{icon:'🚴',tag:'SPORT SU RUOTE',title:'Protesi nel Ciclismo',body:`
    <p>Nel ciclismo le protesi devono trasmettere forza al pedale con efficienza massima. Si usano <strong>attacchi rigidi</strong> che collegano la protesi direttamente al sistema clip del pedale, trasformando ogni spinta in pura propulsione.</p>
    <p>Atleti come <strong>Reza Jadidi</strong> competono in handbike e ciclismo su pista. Le protesi per il ciclismo su strada usano sistemi a leva che migliorano l'efficienza della pedalata del 40% rispetto alle protesi standard.</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Interfacce rigide ottimizzate per trasferimento di coppia</li>
      <li>Adattatori universali compatibili con pedali SPD/Look</li>
      <li>Ammortizzatori per assorbire le vibrazioni del fondo stradale</li>
      <li>Alcune includono sensori di potenza integrati</li>
    </ul>
  `},
  basket:{icon:'🏀',tag:'SPORT DI SQUADRA',title:'Protesi nel Basket',body:`
    <p>Il basket in carrozzina e il basket paralimpico richiedono protesi ad <strong>alta flessibilità dinamica</strong>: devono permettere cambi di direzione bruschi, salti e interazioni fisiche con altri giocatori. Le protesi per arti superiori consentono palleggio, ricezione e tiro.</p>
    <p>La <strong>i-Limb Ultra</strong> di Össur, con le sue 5 dita motorizzate individualmente, permette la presa del pallone con una naturalezza sorprendente. I giocatori la programmano via app per diverse "prese" specifiche del basket.</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Mano bionica con 5 dita motorizzate e 24 prese programmate</li>
      <li>Resistenza agli urti e alla polvere (IP67)</li>
      <li>Risposta in 100ms dal segnale muscolare al movimento</li>
      <li>Batteria da 8 ore per gare e allenamenti</li>
    </ul>
  `},
  scherma:{icon:'🤺',tag:'SPORT DA COMBATTIMENTO',title:'Protesi nella Scherma',body:`
    <p>La scherma paralimpica è uno degli sport più tecnici per le protesi. L'arto superiore deve tenere la spada con precisione, trasmettere la forza della stoccata e — fondamentale — rilasciare istantaneamente la presa in caso di disarmo senza danni alla protesi.</p>
    <p>Si usano <strong>adattatori fissi</strong> che bloccano la spada alla protesi con sistemi a sgancio rapido. La schermitrice italiana <strong>Bebe Vio</strong> ha reso famoso questo sport, vincendo ori olimpici con protesi bilaterali agli arti superiori e inferiori.</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Adattatori in alluminio aeronautico ultra-leggeri</li>
      <li>Sistema di bloccaggio rapido certificato FIE</li>
      <li>Protezione contro le scariche elettriche del segnale di stoccata</li>
      <li>Personalizzate per ogni tipo di spada: fioretto, sciabola, spada</li>
    </ul>
  `},
  arrampicata:{icon:'🧗',tag:'SPORT ESTREMI',title:'Protesi nell\'Arrampicata',body:`
    <p>L'arrampicata è forse la sfida più estrema per le protesi: richiede presa su superfici millimetriche, distribuzione precisa del peso e capacità di "sentire" la roccia. Le protesi per scalatori usano <strong>punte in carbonio</strong> o estremità in gomma ad alta attrito.</p>
    <p>Scalatori come <strong>Craig DeMartino</strong> usano protesi per arti inferiori con piede in carbonio rigido che si inserisce nelle crepe della roccia. Alcune protesi di mano per scalatori sono terminali fissi a gancio che permettono prese impossibili per una mano biologica.</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Terminali in gomma Vibram ad altissima aderenza</li>
      <li>Punte rigide in carbonio per crepe e fessure</li>
      <li>Sistemi di torsione per seguire la morfologia della parete</li>
      <li>Peso ridotto al minimo: ogni grammo conta in verticale</li>
    </ul>
  `}
};

function openModal(key){
  const s = sports[key];
  document.getElementById('m-tag').textContent = s.tag;
  document.getElementById('m-icon').textContent = s.icon;
  document.getElementById('m-title').textContent = s.title;
  document.getElementById('m-body').innerHTML = s.body;
  document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open');
}
function closeModal(){
  document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
}
function closeModalOutside(e){
  if(e.target.id==='modal-overlay') closeModal();
}
</script>

<!-- ══ PART 2 OVERLAY ══ -->
<div id="part2-overlay">
  <canvas id="neuron-bg-canvas"></canvas>
  <div id="neuron-question" style="display:none!important;opacity:0!important;pointer-events:none!important;"></div>
  <div id="brain-wrap">
    <canvas id="brain-canvas"></canvas>
  </div>
  <div id="neuron-content" style="position:relative;z-index:5;width:100%;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:24px 32px 120px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;">

  <!-- Brain image in scroll flow -->
  <div id="brain-scroll-wrap" style="text-align:center;padding:30px 0 10px;position:relative;z-index:5;">
    <canvas id="brain-scroll-img"></canvas>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Cosa sono i neuroni -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 01</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2">Cosa sono i Neuroni?</h2>
    <p class="n-p">I <strong>neuroni</strong> sono le cellule del sistema nervoso specializzate nella trasmissione di informazioni. Il cervello umano ne contiene circa <strong>86 miliardi</strong> — più stelle della Via Lattea. Ognuno forma migliaia di connessioni con altri neuroni, creando una rete più complessa di qualsiasi computer mai costruito.</p>
    <p class="n-p">A differenza delle altre cellule del corpo, i neuroni quasi <strong>non si riproducono</strong> dopo la nascita. Quelli che hai oggi sono in buona parte gli stessi con cui sei nato — ma le connessioni tra loro cambiano continuamente, ogni volta che impari qualcosa di nuovo.</p>
    <div class="n-info-box">
      <div class="n-info-row"><span class="n-info-label">📏 Lunghezza assone</span><span class="n-info-val">fino a <strong>1 metro</strong> (neuroni spinali)</span></div>
      <div class="n-info-row"><span class="n-info-label">⚡ Velocità segnale</span><span class="n-info-val">fino a <strong>120 m/s</strong></span></div>
      <div class="n-info-row"><span class="n-info-label">🔢 Numero nel cervello</span><span class="n-info-val"><strong>86 miliardi</strong></span></div>
      <div class="n-info-row"><span class="n-info-label">🔗 Connessioni totali</span><span class="n-info-val"><strong>100 trilioni</strong> di sinapsi</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STATS ANIMATI -->
  <div class="stat-bars" id="neuron-stats">
    <div class="stat-bar-wrap">
      <div class="stat-bar-label"><span>🔢 NEURONI NEL CERVELLO</span><span>86 miliardi</span></div>
      <div class="stat-bar-track"><div class="stat-bar-fill" style="--target-w:86%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-bar-wrap">
      <div class="stat-bar-label"><span>🔗 SINAPSI PER NEURONE</span><span>fino a 10.000</span></div>
      <div class="stat-bar-track"><div class="stat-bar-fill" style="--target-w:100%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-bar-wrap">
      <div class="stat-bar-label"><span>⚡ VELOCITÀ SEGNALE</span><span>120 m/s</span></div>
      <div class="stat-bar-track"><div class="stat-bar-fill" style="--target-w:72%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-bar-wrap">
      <div class="stat-bar-label"><span>🔋 ENERGIA USATA</span><span>20 watt (2% del peso, 20% energia)</span></div>
      <div class="stat-bar-track"><div class="stat-bar-fill" style="--target-w:20%"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-bar-wrap">
      <div class="stat-bar-label"><span>💾 CAPACITÀ MEMORIA</span><span>2.5 petabyte stimati</span></div>
      <div class="stat-bar-track"><div class="stat-bar-fill" style="--target-w:95%"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 2: Struttura del neurone -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 02</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2">La Struttura di un Neurone</h2>
    <p class="n-p">Ogni neurone ha tre parti principali che lavorano insieme per ricevere, elaborare e trasmettere informazioni attraverso il corpo e il cervello.</p>
    <div class="n-cards">
      <div class="n-card">
        <div class="n-card-icon">🔵</div>
        <h3>Soma (Corpo cellulare)</h3>
        <p>Il centro del neurone. Contiene il nucleo con il DNA e gestisce il metabolismo della cellula. Ha un diametro di 4–100 micrometri.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="n-card">
        <div class="n-card-icon">🌿</div>
        <h3>Dendriti</h3>
        <p>Rami che si estendono dal soma come antenne. <strong>Ricevono</strong> i segnali dagli altri neuroni e li portano al corpo cellulare. Un neurone può averne migliaia.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="n-card">
        <div class="n-card-icon">➡️</div>
        <h3>Assone</h3>
        <p><strong>Trasmette</strong> il segnale elettrico lontano dal soma. Può essere lungo fino a 1 metro. Spesso è rivestito di mielina, che accelera la trasmissione.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="n-card">
        <div class="n-card-icon">🔗</div>
        <h3>Sinapsi (Terminali)</h3>
        <p>La punta dell'assone. Rilascia <strong>neurotrasmettitori</strong> nello spazio sinaptico per comunicare col neurone successivo.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="n-card">
        <div class="n-card-icon">⚡</div>
        <h3>Guaina Mielinica</h3>
        <p>Rivestimento grasso che isola l'assone come la plastica intorno ai fili elettrici. Aumenta la velocità del segnale fino a <strong>100 volte</strong>.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="n-card">
        <div class="n-card-icon">🧪</div>
        <h3>Neurotrasmettitori</h3>
        <p>Sostanze chimiche come <strong>dopamina</strong>, serotonina, GABA e glutammato che trasportano il segnale tra i neuroni attraverso la sinapsi.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Neuron popup grid -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2" style="padding-top:0;margin-top:-20px;">
    <div class="section-tag">APPROFONDIMENTI</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2" style="font-size:clamp(1.2rem,3vw,1.8rem);">Esplora i Neuroni</h2>
    <div class="sport-grid">
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openNeuronModal('plasticita')"><span class="sport-icon">🔄</span>NEUROPLASTICITÀ</button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openNeuronModal('sogno')"><span class="sport-icon">💤</span>SONNO E MEMORIA</button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openNeuronModal('dopamina')"><span class="sport-icon">😊</span>DOPAMINA</button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openNeuronModal('ai')"><span class="sport-icon">🤖</span>NEURONI E AI</button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openNeuronModal('malattie')"><span class="sport-icon">⚠️</span>MALATTIE NEURALI</button>
      <button class="sport-btn" onclick="openNeuronModal('record')"><span class="sport-icon">🏆</span>RECORD DEL CERVELLO</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 3: Come funzionano -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 03</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2">Come Comunicano i Neuroni?</h2>
    <p class="n-p">La comunicazione neuronale avviene in due fasi: <strong>elettrica</strong> dentro il neurone, e <strong>chimica</strong> tra un neurone e l'altro. Il meccanismo è noto come "potenziale d'azione".</p>
    <p class="n-p">Quando un neurone riceve abbastanza stimoli dai dendriti, si "attiva": la membrana dell'assone si apre e lascia entrare ioni di sodio caricati positivamente. Questo crea un'onda elettrica che percorre tutto l'assone in una frazione di secondo — ed è la base di ogni pensiero, movimento e sensazione.</p>
    <div class="n-step-list">
      <div class="n-step"><span class="n-step-num">01</span><div><strong>Ricezione:</strong> i dendriti ricevono segnali da altri neuroni tramite i neurotrasmettitori.</div></div>
      <div class="n-step"><span class="n-step-num">02</span><div><strong>Integrazione:</strong> il soma somma tutti i segnali ricevuti. Se superano la soglia, il neurone si attiva.</div></div>
      <div class="n-step"><span class="n-step-num">03</span><div><strong>Trasmissione:</strong> il potenziale d'azione viaggia lungo l'assone a 120 m/s.</div></div>
      <div class="n-step"><span class="n-step-num">04</span><div><strong>Rilascio:</strong> i terminali sinaptici rilasciano neurotrasmettitori nello spazio tra i neuroni.</div></div>
      <div class="n-step"><span class="n-step-num">05</span><div><strong>Ricezione successiva:</strong> il neurone vicino riceve i neurotrasmettitori e il ciclo ricomincia.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <!-- NEURON TOUCH WIDGET -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2">
    <div class="section-tag">LABORATORIO INTERATTIVO</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2" style="font-size:clamp(1.3rem,3.5vw,2rem);">Rete Neurale — Tocca per Attivare</h2>
    <p class="n-p">Tocca o clicca sulla rete neurale per generare impulsi elettrici. Tieni premuto per un'attivazione continua!</p>
    <div class="neuron-widget">
      <div class="neuron-widget-header">
        <span>🧠 RETE NEURALE — SIMULAZIONE IMPULSI</span>
      </div>
      <div class="neuron-canvas-wrap" id="neuron-touch-wrap">
        <img id="neuron-touch-bg" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="neuroni"/>
        <canvas id="neuron-touch-canvas"></canvas>
        <div class="neuron-hint">⚡ TOCCA O CLICCA PER ATTIVARE I NEURONI</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- QUIZ NEURONI -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2">
    <div class="section-tag">TEST INTERATTIVO</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2" style="font-size:clamp(1.3rem,3.5vw,2rem);">Quiz — I Neuroni</h2>
    <div class="quiz-box" id="quiz2">
      <h3>🧠 QUIZ — NEURONI E CERVELLO</h3>
      <div class="quiz-question" id="q2-text"></div>
      <div class="quiz-options" id="q2-opts"></div>
      <div class="quiz-feedback" id="q2-fb"></div>
      <button class="quiz-next" id="q2-next" onclick="nextQ2()">PROSSIMA DOMANDA ▶</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 4: Il cervello -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 04</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2">Il Cervello: Centro di Controllo</h2>
    <p class="n-p">Il cervello è l'organo più complesso dell'universo conosciuto. Pesa circa <strong>1,4 kg</strong> — meno di 2% del peso corporeo — ma consuma il <strong>20% dell'energia</strong> del corpo. È diviso in due emisferi e quattro lobi principali, ognuno specializzato in funzioni precise.</p>
    <div class="n-cards">
      <div class="n-card"><div class="n-card-icon">🧠</div><h3>Lobo Frontale</h3><p>Ragionamento, pianificazione, personalità, movimento volontario e linguaggio. La parte più "umana" del cervello.</p></div>
      <div class="n-card"><div class="n-card-icon">👂</div><h3>Lobo Temporale</h3><p>Memoria, comprensione del linguaggio, udito e riconoscimento dei volti. Sede dell'ippocampo, fondamentale per i ricordi.</p></div>
      <div class="n-card"><div class="n-card-icon">✋</div><h3>Lobo Parietale</h3><p>Elabora le sensazioni fisiche: tatto, dolore, temperatura, pressione. Integra le informazioni sensoriali con lo spazio.</p></div>
      <div class="n-card"><div class="n-card-icon">👁️</div><h3>Lobo Occipitale</h3><p>Interamente dedicato alla vista. Elabora colori, forme, movimento e profondità. Situato nella parte posteriore del cranio.</p></div>
    </div>
    <p class="n-p" style="margin-top:24px;">I neuroni del cervello formano nuove connessioni tutta la vita — questo si chiama <strong>neuroplasticità</strong>. Ogni volta che studi, ti alleni o impari qualcosa, il tuo cervello cambia fisicamente. I neuroni che si attivano insieme si collegano insieme: <em>"neurons that fire together, wire together"</em>.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 5: Neuroni e Robotica -->
  <div class="n-section reveal2">
    <div class="section-tag">CAPITOLO 05</div>
    <h2 class="n-h2">Neuroni e Robotica: Il Ponte</h2>
    <p class="n-p">Le <strong>reti neurali artificiali</strong> alla base dell'intelligenza artificiale sono copiate direttamente dai neuroni biologici. Ogni "nodo" artificiale riceve input, li somma, e se superano una soglia invia un output — esattamente come un neurone reale.</p>
    <p class="n-p">Nelle protesi bioniche, elettrodi posizionati sulla pelle leggono i segnali elettrici dei neuroni motori e li convertono in comandi. In laboratorio esistono già <strong>interfacce neurali dirette</strong> che leggono i pensieri puri dal cervello e li traducono in movimenti robotici — senza alcun muscolo coinvolto.</p>
    <div class="n-info-box">
      <div class="n-info-row"><span class="n-info-label">🤖 Interfaccia neurale</span><span class="n-info-val">BrainGate legge 200+ neuroni simultaneamente</span></div>
      <div class="n-info-row"><span class="n-info-label">🧬 Reti neurali AI</span><span class="n-info-val">GPT-4 ha 1.8 trilioni di parametri (neuroni artificiali)</span></div>
      <div class="n-info-row"><span class="n-info-label">⏱️ Latenza protesi</span><span class="n-info-val">meno di 100ms dal pensiero al movimento</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="height:80px;"></div>
</div>
<div id="seconda-parte">
    <span class="sp-label">SCIENZE</span>
    <span class="sp-main">SCIENZE</span>
  </div>
  <div id="i-neuroni">I NEURONI E IL CERVELLO</div>
</div>

<!-- ══ ROBOT MASCOT ══ -->
<div id="robot-bubble">
  <button class="bubble-close" onclick="closeRobotBubble()">✕</button>
  <div class="bubble-tag">🤖 FUN FACT</div>
  <p class="bubble-text" id="bubble-text"></p>
</div>
<svg id="robot-mascot" onclick="showFunFact()" viewBox="0 0 100 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- antenna -->
  <line x1="50" y1="12" x2="50" y2="22" stroke="#33ccff" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <circle class="antenna-dot" cx="50" cy="9" r="4" fill="#00aaff"/>
  <!-- head -->
  <rect x="18" y="22" width="64" height="52" rx="12" fill="#001e3c" stroke="#33ccff" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- face screen -->
  <rect x="25" y="29" width="50" height="32" rx="6" fill="#002a50"/>
  <!-- eyes -->
  <circle cx="38" cy="43" r="7" fill="#001428"/>
  <circle cx="38" cy="43" r="4.5" fill="#00aaff" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="39.5" cy="41.5" r="1.5" fill="#fff"/>
  <circle cx="62" cy="43" r="7" fill="#001428"/>
  <circle cx="62" cy="43" r="4.5" fill="#00aaff" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="63.5" cy="41.5" r="1.5" fill="#fff"/>
  <!-- mouth smile -->
  <path d="M38 54 Q50 62 62 54" stroke="#33ccff" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- ear bolts -->
  <rect x="10" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="3" fill="#001e3c" stroke="#00aaff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <rect x="81" y="36" width="9" height="14" rx="3" fill="#001e3c" stroke="#00aaff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <!-- neck -->
